torch_pattern: y = torch.nn.functional.conv3d(x.permute(0, 4, 1, 2, 3), weight, bias=bias, stride=stride, padding=padding, dilation=dilation, groups=groups); y = y.permute(0, 2, 3, 4, 1)
weight_transform: torch weight [C_out, C_in/groups, kD, kH, kW] is permuted to channels-last kernel order and flattened for the ttnn matmul-style conv3d kernel (permute(2,3,4,1,0).reshape(kD*kH*kW*C_in_per_group, C_out)); bias reshaped to [1, C_out]. Activation tensor must be in N,D(T),H,W,C channels-last layout (ttnn operates on NTHWC, requiring permute(0,2,3,4,1) of torch NCDHW input).
applicability_notes: fusion_notes: Replaces a permute -> F.conv3d -> permute chain on channels-last device tensors. Call sites show explicit temporal padding handled outside the op (pad_dimension_t / halo exchange with padding_mode='replicate' before conv3d), so torch padding along D may be lowered to a separate pad + conv3d(padding_d=0).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: activation [N, T, H, W, C_in] channels-last
placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, pad_value=0) with default interleaved DRAM; Conv3dConfig built with C_in_block and full compute grid
unit test / model call sites: weight prepared once on host, stored as default interleaved DRAM tile tensor (self.weight.data)
